name: Salmon Mousse with Sour Cream Dill Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Canned salmon; drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in cold water.
2. Add boiling water and stir until gelatin has dissolved.
3. Cool mixture.
4. Stir in mayonnaise, lemon juice, onion, Tabasco sauce, paprika, and salt; mix well.
5. Chill to the consistency of an unbeaten egg white.
6. Add salmon and capers; beat well.
7. Whip cream; fold into salmon mixture.
8. Turn mousse into a 2-quart oiled fish mold; add cottage cheese to fill mold.
9. Chill until set.
10. Unmold onto serving platter and garnish with watercress, lemon slices, and salmon roe.
11. Serve with sour cream dill sauce.
